messages.message:
Hey there, 

Where are you located, i’d like to oder 2 pilates machines
你好，

你所在的位置是哪里？我想订购两台普拉提机。

facebook广告  查看详情Hi! Thanks for reaching out 
To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan?
 Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 Roughly how many units are you considering?
 Which country will the machines be delivered to?
My plan is using it for myself at my home , i’d like to oder 2 units, it will be delivered in canda Montreal, Québec

Hi 

We are based in China and ship globally, including Canada. Montreal delivery is no problem.

Since this is for home use, may I quickly check:

Do you prefer a foldable model to save space, or a fixed-frame reformer like studios use?

And do you lean more toward wood style or aluminum frame?

Once I know your preference, I’ll recommend the most suitable model for you.
嗨 

我们总部位于中国，向全球发货，包括加拿大。蒙特利尔地区的配送没有问题。

既然这是家用，我可以快速确认一下：

您是倾向于折叠式以节省空间，还是像工作室那样使用固定框架的改革器？

还有，您更倾向于木制风格还是铝制框架？

一旦我了解您的偏好，就会为您推荐最合适的型号。

Hey there, 

Yes, foldable model will be great with a wood style.
嗨，

是的，折叠式手机搭配木纹风格会很棒。

Great 

For foldable wood-style reformers, I’d suggest two options for home use:

Option 1 – FR001
Stable structure, smooth carriage, and easy folding. Very suitable for regular home training.

Option 2 – FR002
Slightly stronger frame and heavier feel, closer to studio experience.

May I know if you’re working within a specific budget range?
That will help me guide you to the most suitable one.
What is the price between the two.

Sure 

For 1–9 units pricing:

FR001 – USD 421 per unit
FR002 – USD 460 per unit

The difference is USD 39 per machine.

Since you’re ordering 2 units, the total difference would be USD 78.

FR002 mainly gives a slightly stronger frame and heavier feel.
If you’re mainly using it for regular home workouts, FR001 is already very stable and popular.

Let me know which direction you feel more comfortable with, and I can calculate the total cost to Montreal for you.
确认 

1-9 个单位的定价：

FR001 – 每单位 421 美元
FR002 – 每单位 460 美元

每台机器的差价是 39 美元。

由于您订购 2 台，总差价将是 78 美元。

FR002 主要提供略微更坚固的框架和更重的手感。
如果您主要用它进行常规的家庭锻炼，FR001 已经非常稳定且受欢迎。

请告诉我您感觉更舒适的方案，我可以帮您计算到蒙特利尔的总体费用。

I’ll take the frame 1
我将拿框架 1

Perfect FR001 is a very solid choice for home use.

For 2 units:
USD 421 × 2 = USD 842

May I have your full postal code in Montreal?
I’ll calculate the shipping cost and give you the total landed price to your address.
Perfect FR001 是一个非常适合家庭使用的稳固选择。

对于 2 个单位：
USD 421 × 2 = USD 842

我可以知道您在蒙特利尔的全邮政编码吗？
我将计算运费，并给你地址的总落地价。
8110, rue comtois, H1P2N7

Shipping to Montreal H1P2N7 (DDP – including customs clearance and tax):

Shipping cost: USD 480

Transit time is approximately 45 days after vessel departure.

So the updated total would be:

Product total (2 × FR001): USD 842
Shipping (DDP): USD 480

Total landed price: USD 1,322

This includes delivery to your door.

If everything looks good, I can prepare the invoice for you.
运送到蒙特利尔 H1P2N7（DDP——包括清关和税费）：

运费：480 美元

装运时间大约为船舶离港后 45 天。

因此，更新后的总金额为：

产品总额（2 × FR001）：842 美元
运费（DDP）：480 美元

总落地价：1,322 美元

包含送货上门服务。

如果一切看起来都合适，我可以为您准备发票。

Hey there, 

Yes you can

Perfect 

To prepare the Proforma Invoice, I’ll need the following details:

完美 

为了准备形式发票，我需要以下详细信息：

Company name (if applicable)  
Receiver full name  
Contact phone number  
Full delivery address  
Postal code  
Email address (for sending the invoice)  

Once I receive this information, I’ll prepare the invoice for you right away.

会立即为您准备发票。Company name Recrutement élégance inc. 
Dina Polynice
(514)839-4091
Delivery: 8110, rue comtois, Montreal, Qc, H1P2N7
schnaipoly@hotmail.com
公司名称 Recrutement élégance inc.
Dina Polynice
(514)839-4091
配送地址：8110, rue comtois, 蒙特利尔,魁北克, H1P2N7
schnaipoly@hotmail.com

Perfect Thank you for the details.

I will prepare the Proforma Invoice now under:

Company: Recrutement Élégance Inc.
Receiver: Dina Polynice
Delivery address: 8110, rue Comtois, Montreal, QC H1P2N7

Total amount: USD 1,322 (DDP to door)

I will send the invoice to: schnaipoly@hotmail.com shortly.

Once payment is completed, production will take approximately 7–10 days, and shipment will be arranged immediately after.

I’ll update you once the invoice is sent.

Okey
好的

Hi Dina 

I’ve prepared the Proforma Invoice and sent it to your email.

Please have a look and confirm once you’ve reviewed it.
Let me know if you have any questions.
嗨，Dina 

我已经准备好形式发票，并发送到了您的邮箱。

请查看并确认您已审阅。
如果您有任何问题，请告诉我。

Hi Dina 

Just checking in to see if you’ve had a chance to review the Proforma Invoice.

If you need any assistance with the payment process, please let me know.

We also accept credit card payment if that’s more convenient for you.

Hey there,

I do not forget, i’m trying to get my husband on board
嘿，

我不会忘记，我正在努力让我的丈夫加入

Hi Dina 

Of course, I completely understand.
Take your time to discuss it together.

If it helps, I’m happy to answer any questions your husband may have about the product, shipping, or warranty.

Just let me know — I’m here to help.

Hi Dina 

Just checking in with you. I completely understand that this kind of purchase usually needs to be discussed together.

If your husband has any questions about the reformer, shipping, warranty, or the invoice, I’d be very happy to clarify everything clearly for you both.

No rush at all — whenever you’re ready, just message me here.

Hi Dina 

Just wanted to follow up with you one more time regarding the FR001 order.

Since some time has passed, I just wanted to check whether you and your husband are still planning to move forward with it, or if you’d prefer to revisit it a little later.

Either way is completely fine — I just wanted to check in so I can arrange things properly on my side.
由于有些时间过去了，我想问问你和你先生是否还在计划继续进行，或者是否希望稍后再重新考虑一下。

无论哪种方式都可以——我只是想确认一下，以便我能在我的方面妥善安排事情。

Hey there, 

Right now we postpone the project because we’re not financially prepared for this.

No problem at all — I’ll keep your details on file.
Whenever you’re ready, just message me and I’ll take care of everything for you right away.

Hi Dina 

I completely understand — that makes total sense.

Many of our clients were in a similar situation at first, and chose to move forward a bit later when the timing felt right.
嗨，达娜 

我完全理解——这完全有道理。

我们许多客户最初都处于类似情况，并在感觉时机合适时稍后选择继续前进。

我完全理解——这完全有道理。

seller_only_text:
facebook广告  查看详情Hi! Thanks for reaching out 
To make sure I point you to the right Pilates Reformer, could you tell me a bit about your plan?
 Is this for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 Roughly how many units are you considering?
 Which country will the machines be delivered to?
Hi 

We are based in China and ship globally, including Canada. Montreal delivery is no problem.

Since this is for home use, may I quickly check:

Do you prefer a foldable model to save space, or a fixed-frame reformer like studios use?

And do you lean more toward wood style or aluminum frame?

Once I know your preference, I’ll recommend the most suitable model for you.
嗨 

我们总部位于中国，向全球发货，包括加拿大。蒙特利尔地区的配送没有问题。

既然这是家用，我可以快速确认一下：

您是倾向于折叠式以节省空间，还是像工作室那样使用固定框架的改革器？

还有，您更倾向于木制风格还是铝制框架？

一旦我了解您的偏好，就会为您推荐最合适的型号。
Great 

For foldable wood-style reformers, I’d suggest two options for home use:

Option 1 – FR001
Stable structure, smooth carriage, and easy folding. Very suitable for regular home training.

Option 2 – FR002
Slightly stronger frame and heavier feel, closer to studio experience.

May I know if you’re working within a specific budget range?
That will help me guide you to the most suitable one.
Sure 

For 1–9 units pricing:

FR001 – USD 421 per unit
FR002 – USD 460 per unit

The difference is USD 39 per machine.

Since you’re ordering 2 units, the total difference would be USD 78.

FR002 mainly gives a slightly stronger frame and heavier feel.
If you’re mainly using it for regular home workouts, FR001 is already very stable and popular.

Let me know which direction you feel more comfortable with, and I can calculate the total cost to Montreal for you.

FR001 – 每单位 421 美元
FR002 – 每单位 460 美元

每台机器的差价是 39 美元。

由于您订购 2 台，总差价将是 78 美元。

FR002 主要提供略微更坚固的框架和更重的手感。
如果您主要用它进行常规的家庭锻炼，FR001 已经非常稳定且受欢迎。

请告诉我您感觉更舒适的方案，我可以帮您计算到蒙特利尔的总体费用。
Perfect FR001 is a very solid choice for home use.

For 2 units:
USD 421 × 2 = USD 842

May I have your full postal code in Montreal?
I’ll calculate the shipping cost and give you the total landed price to your address.
Perfect FR001 是一个非常适合家庭使用的稳固选择。

对于 2 个单位：
USD 421 × 2 = USD 842

我可以知道您在蒙特利尔的全邮政编码吗？
我将计算运费，并给你地址的总落地价。

Shipping cost: USD 480

Transit time is approximately 45 days after vessel departure.

So the updated total would be:

Product total (2 × FR001): USD 842
Shipping (DDP): USD 480

Total landed price: USD 1,322

This includes delivery to your door.

If everything looks good, I can prepare the invoice for you.

运费：480 美元

装运时间大约为船舶离港后 45 天。

运费（DDP）：480 美元

包含送货上门服务。

No rush at all — whenever you’re ready, just message me here.

Either way is completely fine — I just wanted to check in so I can arrange things properly on my side.
